title: ELEMENTALPOWERS4SMP
description: it was a plugin for 1.21.11, in which it has 6 elemental powers , earth, air, water, fire, and dark magic
body:
Features:

6 elemental powers: Earth, Air, Water, Fire, Lightning, Dark Magic
5 progressive levels per power with scaling abilities
Random power assignment on first join
Level up by killing players
Powers activated by right-click, shift+right-click, or /power use command
Commands:
/power - View your power and level
/power <player> - View another player's power
/power use - Activate your power
/power set <player> <power> [level] - Admin: Set player's power
/power reset <player> - Admin: Reset player to random power
/power reload - Admin: Reload configuration
Power Abilities by Level: Each power scales with level (1-5) with unique effects for combat and utility.
